title: Alphabet
subtitle: A to Z letters and first words

cards.title: A — Apple
cards.question: What letter is this?
cards.answerText: A! A is for apple. Crunch, crunch, apple! Great job!
cards.funText: A! A is for apple. Crunch, crunch, apple! Great job!

cards.title: B — Bear
cards.question: Can you find the letter?
cards.answerText: B! B is for bear. Big friendly bear! Nice one!
cards.funText: B! B is for bear. Big friendly bear! Nice one!

cards.title: C — Cat
cards.question: What letter do you see?
cards.answerText: C! C is for cat. Meow meow, cat! Awesome!
cards.funText: C! C is for cat. Meow meow, cat! Awesome!

cards.title: D — Dog
cards.question: Do you know this letter?
cards.answerText: D! D is for dog. Woof woof, dog! Good job!
cards.funText: D! D is for dog. Woof woof, dog! Good job!

cards.title: E — Elephant
cards.question: Which alphabet friend is this?
cards.answerText: E! E is for elephant. Stomp stomp, elephant! Way to go!
cards.funText: E! E is for elephant. Stomp stomp, elephant! Way to go!

cards.title: F — Frog
cards.question: What sound starts this word?
cards.answerText: F! F is for frog. Hop hop, frog! Great work!
cards.funText: F! F is for frog. Hop hop, frog! Great work!

cards.title: G — Giraffe
cards.question: Can you say this letter?
cards.answerText: G! G is for giraffe. Tall tall giraffe! You got it!
cards.funText: G! G is for giraffe. Tall tall giraffe! You got it!

cards.title: H — Helicopter
cards.question: What letter comes with this picture?
cards.answerText: H! H is for helicopter. Whirr whirr, helicopter! Awesome!
cards.funText: H! H is for helicopter. Whirr whirr, helicopter! Awesome!

cards.title: I — Ice Cream
cards.question: What letter is this?
cards.answerText: I! I is for ice cream. Yum yum, ice cream! Nice one!
cards.funText: I! I is for ice cream. Yum yum, ice cream! Nice one!

cards.title: J — Jellyfish
cards.question: Can you find the letter?
cards.answerText: J! J is for jellyfish. Wiggle wiggle, jellyfish! Good job!
cards.funText: J! J is for jellyfish. Wiggle wiggle, jellyfish! Good job!

cards.title: K — Kite
cards.question: What letter do you see?
cards.answerText: K! K is for kite. Up up, kite! Great work!
cards.funText: K! K is for kite. Up up, kite! Great work!

cards.title: L — Lion
cards.question: Do you know this letter?
cards.answerText: L! L is for lion. Roar roar, lion! Way to go!
cards.funText: L! L is for lion. Roar roar, lion! Way to go!

cards.title: M — Monkey
cards.question: Which alphabet friend is this?
cards.answerText: M! M is for monkey. Ooh ooh, monkey! Awesome!
cards.funText: M! M is for monkey. Ooh ooh, monkey! Awesome!

cards.title: N — Narwhal
cards.question: What sound starts this word?
cards.answerText: N! N is for narwhal. Swim swim, narwhal! You got it!
cards.funText: N! N is for narwhal. Swim swim, narwhal! You got it!

cards.title: O — Octopus
cards.question: Can you say this letter?
cards.answerText: O! O is for octopus. Eight wiggly arms! Great job!
cards.funText: O! O is for octopus. Eight wiggly arms! Great job!

cards.title: P — Penguin
cards.question: What letter comes with this picture?
cards.answerText: P! P is for penguin. Waddle waddle, penguin! Nice one!
cards.funText: P! P is for penguin. Waddle waddle, penguin! Nice one!

cards.title: Q — Quail
cards.question: What letter is this?
cards.answerText: Q! Q is for quail. Tiny little quail! Good job!
cards.funText: Q! Q is for quail. Tiny little quail! Good job!

cards.title: R — Rainbow
cards.question: Can you find the letter?
cards.answerText: R! R is for rainbow. So many colors! Great work!
cards.funText: R! R is for rainbow. So many colors! Great work!

cards.title: S — Sun
cards.question: What letter do you see?
cards.answerText: S! S is for sun. Bright warm sun! Awesome!
cards.funText: S! S is for sun. Bright warm sun! Awesome!

cards.title: T — Truck
cards.question: Do you know this letter?
cards.answerText: T! T is for truck. Rumble rumble, truck! Way to go!
cards.funText: T! T is for truck. Rumble rumble, truck! Way to go!

cards.title: U — Umbrella
cards.question: Which alphabet friend is this?
cards.answerText: U! U is for umbrella. Stay dry, umbrella! You got it!
cards.funText: U! U is for umbrella. Stay dry, umbrella! You got it!

cards.title: V — Volcano
cards.question: What sound starts this word?
cards.answerText: V! V is for volcano. Boom boom, volcano! Great job!
cards.funText: V! V is for volcano. Boom boom, volcano! Great job!

cards.title: W — Whale
cards.question: Can you say this letter?
cards.answerText: W! W is for whale. Big blue whale! Nice one!
cards.funText: W! W is for whale. Big blue whale! Nice one!

cards.title: X — Xylophone
cards.question: What letter comes with this picture?
cards.answerText: X! X is for xylophone. Ding ding, xylophone! Awesome!
cards.funText: X! X is for xylophone. Ding ding, xylophone! Awesome!

cards.title: Y — Yak
cards.question: What letter is this?
cards.answerText: Y! Y is for yak. Fuzzy yak! Good job!
cards.funText: Y! Y is for yak. Fuzzy yak! Good job!

cards.title: Z — Zebra
cards.question: Can you find the letter?
cards.answerText: Z! Z is for zebra. Stripey zebra! You did it!
cards.funText: Z! Z is for zebra. Stripey zebra! You did it!
